personas.guest: Hungry, relaxed, expects frictionless service. Mobile-first user.
personas.admin: Busy, focused, needs data density and quick actions. Desktop-first user.

usage.prices: Plus Jakarta Sans, Gold (#D4AF37) or Dark Green

primary.description: Deep Forest Green - Headings, Primary Actions (Guest)

secondary.description: Gold - Accents, Borders, Highlights, Active States

background.description: Warm Sand (Guest) / Slate-50 (Admin Main) / Dark Slate (Admin Sidebar)

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A2E05] text-white hover:bg-[#1A2E05]/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#1A2E05] text-[#1A2E05] hover:bg-[#1A2E05]/5 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.accent: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#0F172A] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/90 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-bold shadow-md

cards.guest_item: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all rounded-xl overflow-hidden group
cards.admin_stat: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg p-6
cards.kds_ticket: bg-slate-800 text-slate-50 border-l-4 border-l-blue-500 rounded-md p-4 shadow-md

assets.icons: Lucide React (default) or Phosphor Icons (for refined look)

general: Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
Do NOT use generic 'Inter' font. Import Playfair Display and Plus Jakarta Sans.
guest_flow: Use Glassmorphism for cards and sticky navs.
Images should be high-quality, full-width on mobile cards.
Price tags should be prominent, using the Gold accent color.
admin_flow: Sidebar must be #0F172A (Dark Slate) with Gold active states.
Main content area should be clean white/gray.
KDS (Kitchen Display) should default to Dark Mode for contrast.
Use dense tables for order lists.
